hooks.command: echo '=== Project Local Directories ==='; echo '~/.nsys-symbols          — CUDA symbol cache (nsys, NOT YET CREATED)'; echo '~/results/nsight/        — nsys profiling output (NOT YET CREATED)'; echo '/opt/kraken2-build/      — Kraken-2 built from source with -pg (NOT YET CREATED)'; echo '================================'
cd ~/Desktop/summer_project && git pull origin hobbbit 2>/dev/null || true
echo '=== MEMORY RECAP ==='; echo '--- index.md ---'; cat ~/Desktop/summer_project/index.md; echo; echo '--- daily_summary.md (recent) ---'; tail -40 ~/Desktop/summer_project/daily_summary.md

allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); assets=[a['browser_download_url'] for a in data['assets'] if 'win64' in a['name'] and a['name'].endswith\('.zip'\)]; print\(assets[0] if assets else 'not found'\); print\('version:', data['tag_name']\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(a['name'], a['browser_download_url']\) for a in data['assets']]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(len\(data\), 'assets'\); [print\(a['name']\) for a in data]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['tag_name'], len\(r['assets']\), 'assets'\) for r in data]")
